I'll author this playbook step-by-step. Let me first gather the required information about connectors and operations.
Good! PagerDuty connector is available. Let me get its operations:
Let me check the create_incident operation and discover the severity picklist better:
Now let me check the Severity picklist:
Perfect. Now let me draft the complete playbook:
I need to add the missing steps and fix the branch targets. Let me restructure:
The issue is that the decision condition references a step that may not run. I need to adjust the decision logic to use the stashed severity directly. Let me fix this:
The issue is that the "Finish" branch from the decision doesn't reach the "Re_fetch_Ticket" step on the same control flow. I need to ensure the decision only checks on the path after the re-fetch. Let me trace the structure—actually, the issue is the step naming convention. Let me check the slug:

The "Re-fetch Ticket" step should generate slug "Re_fetch_Ticket". The walker is saying it doesn't run on the branch. This is because the decision is branching and the "Finish" path doesn't include "Re_fetch_Ticket" in its reachability. The typed walker is very strict: it only allows references to steps that are on the **same branch path** as the reference.

The fix: I need to ensure the decision only exists **after** Re_fetch_Ticket runs, which means it should come after all possible paths have access to it. Since the decision **is** after Re_fetch_Ticket, the walker should be seeing it. Let me check the slugification more carefully—maybe it's a name mapping issue:

verify_args.yaml_text:
collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: NOC Ticket SLA Escalation
    description: Trigger on NOC ticket update when sla_pct crosses 80 AND severity is High/Critical. Page primary on-call via PagerDuty, wait 15 min, then check acknowledged_at. If still null, page manager and escalate severity.
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - type: start_on_update
        name: NOC Ticket Update Check
        arguments:
          module: tickets
          when:
            logic: AND
            filters:
              - field: sla_pct
                op: gt
                value: "80"
              - field: severity
                op: in
                value:
                  - High
                  - Critical
      - type: set_variable
        name: Stash Ticket Details
        vars:
          ticket_id: "{{ vars.input.records[0]['@id'] }}"
          ticket_number: "{{ vars.input.records[0].name }}"
          ticket_severity: "{{ vars.input.records[0].severity }}"
          ticket_sla_pct: "{{ vars.input.records[0].sla_pct }}"
        message:
          content: "NOC ticket escalation initiated - SLA at {{ vars.ticket_sla_pct }}%"
          tags: [noc_escalation, automation]
      - type: connector
        name: Page On Call via PagerDuty
        arguments:
          connector: pagerduty
          operation: create_incident
          config: ""
          params:
            from: "{{ vars.input.params.creator_email | default('noc@company.com') }}"
            title: "NOC Ticket {{ vars.ticket_number }} - SLA Escalation"
            description: "Ticket {{ vars.ticket_number }} has exceeded 80% SLA threshold. Severity: {{ vars.ticket_severity }}. SLA At: {{ vars.ticket_sla_pct }}%"
            priority: "Priority 1"
            urgency: "High"
            incident_key: "noc-ticket-{{ vars.ticket_number }}"
      - type: set_variable
        name: Store PagerDuty Incident
        vars:
          pagerduty_incident_id: "{{ vars.steps.Page_On_Call_via_PagerDuty.incident.id }}"
      - type: delay
        name: Wait 15 Minutes
        arguments:
          minutes: 15
      - type: find_record
        name: Re-fetch Ticket
        arguments:
          module: tickets
          query:
            logic: AND
            filters:
              - field: "@id"
                operator: eq
                value: "{{ vars.ticket_id }}"
          partial: true
      - type: decision
        name: Check Acknowledged Status
        conditions:
          - display: Acknowledged
            when: "{{ vars.steps.Re_fetch_Ticket['hydra:member'][0].acknowledged_at is not none }}"
            next: Finish
          - display: Not Acknowledged
            default: true
            next: Escalate Severity And Page Manager
      - type: connector
        name: Page Manager via PagerDuty
        arguments:
          connector: pagerduty
          operation: create_incident
          config: ""
          params:
            from: "{{ vars.input.params.creator_email | default('noc@company.com') }}"
            title: "NOC Ticket {{ vars.ticket_number }} - MANAGER ESCALATION"
            description: "Ticket {{ vars.ticket_number }} STILL UNACKNOWLEDGED after 15 minutes. Severity: {{ vars.ticket_severity }}. SLA At: {{ vars.ticket_sla_pct }}%. Escalating to manager."
            priority: "Priority 1"
            urgency: "High"
            incident_key: "noc-ticket-manager-{{ vars.ticket_number }}"
      - type: decision
        name: Check Current Severity
        conditions:
          - display: Currently High
            when: "{{ vars.ticket_severity == 'High' }}"
            next: Update To Critical
          - display: Already Critical
            default: true
            next: Add Comment Already Critical
      - type: update_record
        name: Update To Critical
        arguments:
          module: tickets
          collection: "{{ vars.ticket_id }}"
          resource:
            severity: Critical
      - type: set_variable
        name: Record Escalation Action
        vars:
          escalation_note: "Severity escalated from High to Critical due to unacknowledged SLA breach"
        message:
          content: "Severity escalated to Critical - ticket unacknowledged after 15 min"
          tags: [noc_escalation, severity_escalated]
      - type: end
        name: Finish

required_fixes.message: vars.steps.Re_fetch_Ticket referenced in step 'check_acknowledged_status' but 'Re_fetch_Ticket' does not run on branch 'noc_ticket_update_check'

warnings.message: vars.steps.Page_On_Call_via_PagerDuty.incident.id resolves through unknown shape (connector_op safety=unknown; live shape not available)
live_probe=False; safe-op output shapes degrade to static schema and downstream refs may be over-permissive

verify_args.yaml_text:
collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: NOC Ticket SLA Escalation
    description: Trigger on NOC ticket update when sla_pct crosses 80 AND severity is High/Critical. Page primary on-call via PagerDuty, wait 15 min, then check acknowledged_at. If still null, page manager and escalate severity.
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - type: start_on_update
        name: NOC Ticket Update Check
        arguments:
          module: tickets
          when:
            logic: AND
            filters:
              - field: sla_pct
                op: gt
                value: "80"
              - field: severity
                op: in
                value:
                  - High
                  - Critical
        next: Stash Ticket Details
      - type: set_variable
        name: Stash Ticket Details
        vars:
          ticket_id: "{{ vars.input.records[0]['@id'] }}"
          ticket_number: "{{ vars.input.records[0].name }}"
          ticket_severity: "{{ vars.input.records[0].severity }}"
          ticket_sla_pct: "{{ vars.input.records[0].sla_pct }}"
        message:
          content: "NOC ticket escalation initiated - SLA at {{ vars.ticket_sla_pct }}%"
          tags: [noc_escalation, automation]
        next: Page On Call via PagerDuty
      - type: connector
        name: Page On Call via PagerDuty
        arguments:
          connector: pagerduty
          operation: create_incident
          config: ""
          params:
            from: "{{ vars.input.params.creator_email | default('noc@company.com') }}"
            title: "NOC Ticket {{ vars.ticket_number }} - SLA Escalation"
            description: "Ticket {{ vars.ticket_number }} has exceeded 80% SLA threshold. Severity: {{ vars.ticket_severity }}. SLA At: {{ vars.ticket_sla_pct }}%"
            priority: "Priority 1"
            urgency: "High"
            incident_key: "noc-ticket-{{ vars.ticket_number }}"
        next: Store PagerDuty Incident
      - type: set_variable
        name: Store PagerDuty Incident
        vars:
          pagerduty_incident_id: "{{ vars.steps.Page_On_Call_via_PagerDuty.incident.id }}"
        next: Wait 15 Minutes
      - type: delay
        name: Wait 15 Minutes
        arguments:
          minutes: 15
        next: Re-fetch Ticket
      - type: find_record
        name: Re-fetch Ticket
        arguments:
          module: tickets
          query:
            logic: AND
            filters:
              - field: "@id"
                operator: eq
                value: "{{ vars.ticket_id }}"
          partial: true
        next: Check Acknowledged Status
      - type: decision
        name: Check Acknowledged Status
        conditions:
          - display: Acknowledged
            when: "{{ vars.steps.Re_fetch_Ticket['hydra:member'][0].acknowledged_at is not none }}"
            next: Finish
          - display: Not Acknowledged
            default: true
            next: Page Manager via PagerDuty
      - type: connector
        name: Page Manager via PagerDuty
        arguments:
          connector: pagerduty
          operation: create_incident
          config: ""
          params:
            from: "{{ vars.input.params.creator_email | default('noc@company.com') }}"
            title: "NOC Ticket {{ vars.ticket_number }} - MANAGER ESCALATION"
            description: "Ticket {{ vars.ticket_number }} STILL UNACKNOWLEDGED after 15 minutes. Severity: {{ vars.ticket_severity }}. SLA At: {{ vars.ticket_sla_pct }}%. Escalating to manager."
            priority: "Priority 1"
            urgency: "High"
            incident_key: "noc-ticket-manager-{{ vars.ticket_number }}"
        next: Check Current Severity
      - type: decision
        name: Check Current Severity
        conditions:
          - display: Currently High
            when: "{{ vars.ticket_severity == 'High' }}"
            next: Update To Critical
          - display: Already Critical
            default: true
            next: Add Comment Already Critical
      - type: update_record
        name: Update To Critical
        arguments:
          module: tickets
          collection: "{{ vars.ticket_id }}"
          resource:
            severity: Critical
        next: Record Escalation Action
      - type: set_variable
        name: Record Escalation Action
        vars:
          escalation_note: "Severity escalated from High to Critical due to unacknowledged SLA breach"
        message:
          content: "Severity escalated to Critical - ticket unacknowledged after 15 min"
          tags: [noc_escalation, severity_escalated]
        next: Finish
      - type: set_variable
        name: Add Comment Already Critical
        vars:
          top_severity_note: "Already at Critical severity"
        message:
          content: "Ticket already at top severity (Critical) - manager paged"
          tags: [noc_escalation, already_critical]
        next: Finish
      - type: end
        name: Finish

collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: NOC Ticket SLA Escalation
    description: Trigger on NOC ticket update when sla_pct crosses 80 AND severity is High/Critical. Page primary on-call via PagerDuty, wait 15 min, then check acknowledged_at. If still null, page manager and escalate severity.
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - type: start_on_update
        name: NOC Ticket Update Check
        arguments:
          module: tickets
          when:
            logic: AND
            filters:
              - field: sla_pct
                op: gt
                value: "80"
              - field: severity
                op: in
                value:
                  - High
                  - Critical
        next: Stash Ticket Details
      - type: set_variable
        name: Stash Ticket Details
        vars:
          ticket_id: "{{ vars.input.records[0]['@id'] }}"
          ticket_number: "{{ vars.input.records[0].name }}"
          ticket_severity: "{{ vars.input.records[0].severity }}"
          ticket_sla_pct: "{{ vars.input.records[0].sla_pct }}"
        message:
          content: "NOC ticket escalation initiated - SLA at {{ vars.ticket_sla_pct }}%"
          tags: [noc_escalation, automation]
        next: Page On Call via PagerDuty
      - type: connector
        name: Page On Call via PagerDuty
        arguments:
          connector: pagerduty
          operation: create_incident
          config: ""
          params:
            from: "{{ vars.input.params.creator_email | default('noc@company.com') }}"
            title: "NOC Ticket {{ vars.ticket_number }} - SLA Escalation"
            description: "Ticket {{ vars.ticket_number }} has exceeded 80% SLA threshold. Severity: {{ vars.ticket_severity }}. SLA At: {{ vars.ticket_sla_pct }}%"
            priority: "Priority 1"
            urgency: "High"
            incident_key: "noc-ticket-{{ vars.ticket_number }}"
        next: Store PagerDuty Incident
      - type: set_variable
        name: Store PagerDuty Incident
        vars:
          pagerduty_incident_id: "{{ vars.steps.Page_On_Call_via_PagerDuty.incident.id }}"
        next: Wait 15 Minutes
      - type: delay
        name: Wait 15 Minutes
        arguments:
          minutes: 15
        next: Re-fetch Ticket
      - type: find_record
        name: Re-fetch Ticket
        arguments:
          module: tickets
          query:
            logic: AND
            filters:
              - field: "@id"
                operator: eq
                value: "{{ vars.ticket_id }}"
          partial: true
        next: Check Acknowledged Status
      - type: decision
        name: Check Acknowledged Status
        conditions:
          - display: Acknowledged
            when: "{{ vars.steps.Re_fetch_Ticket['hydra:member'][0].acknowledged_at is not none }}"
            next: Finish
          - display: Not Acknowledged
            default: true
            next: Page Manager via PagerDuty
      - type: connector
        name: Page Manager via PagerDuty
        arguments:
          connector: pagerduty
          operation: create_incident
          config: ""
          params:
            from: "{{ vars.input.params.creator_email | default('noc@company.com') }}"
            title: "NOC Ticket {{ vars.ticket_number }} - MANAGER ESCALATION"
            description: "Ticket {{ vars.ticket_number }} STILL UNACKNOWLEDGED after 15 minutes. Severity: {{ vars.ticket_severity }}. SLA At: {{ vars.ticket_sla_pct }}%. Escalating to manager."
            priority: "Priority 1"
            urgency: "High"
            incident_key: "noc-ticket-manager-{{ vars.ticket_number }}"
        next: Check Current Severity
      - type: decision
        name: Check Current Severity
        conditions:
          - display: Currently High
            when: "{{ vars.ticket_severity == 'High' }}"
            next: Update To Critical
          - display: Already Critical
            default: true
            next: Add Comment Already Critical
      - type: update_record
        name: Update To Critical
        arguments:
          module: tickets
          collection: "{{ vars.ticket_id }}"
          resource:
            severity: "{{ 'Critical' | picklist('severity') }}"
        next: Record Escalation Action
      - type: set_variable
        name: Record Escalation Action
        vars:
          escalation_note: "Severity escalated from High to Critical due to unacknowledged SLA breach"
        message:
          content: "Severity escalated to Critical - ticket unacknowledged after 15 min"
          tags: [noc_escalation, severity_escalated]
        next: Finish
      - type: set_variable
        name: Add Comment Already Critical
        vars:
          top_severity_note: "Already at Critical severity"
        message:
          content: "Ticket already at top severity (Critical) - manager paged"
          tags: [noc_escalation, already_critical]
        next: Finish
      - type: end
        name: Finish
